issue.title: intermittent issue on Windows when starting the Python network thread. stderr: Exception in thread NetworkThread: OSError: [WinError 10022] An invalid argument was supplied
issue.body:
https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/actions/runs/24551395055/job/71778200514?pr=35090#step:10:277:

```

'''
